mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.profile_image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT f_followers.follower_id) AS follower_count, COUNT(DISTINCT f_following.following_id) AS following_count, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND following_id = u.id ) AS is_following FROM users u LEFT JOIN follows f_followers ON f_followers.following_id = u.id LEFT JOIN follows f_following ON f_following.follower_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{id} GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.profile_image_url

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.profile_image_url, COUNT(DISTINCT f_followers.follower_id) AS follower_count, COUNT(DISTINCT f_following.following_id) AS following_count, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND following_id = u.id ) AS is_following FROM users u LEFT JOIN follows f_followers ON f_followers.following_id = u.id LEFT JOIN follows f_following ON f_following.follower_id = u.id WHERE u.username ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.profile_image_url ORDER BY u.username LIMIT 50
